title: Do NOT send a notification on specific status updates

posts.author: Sbi (Søren Bilde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday, I need that on a status that has a due date, we call the status “Not needed” can create an automation that says that a notification must NOT be sent to the owner of the task.

The reason is that on campaigns we have a status “Not needed” which we use when the task suddenly doesn’t have to be prepared anyway, but we need the date and task owner to remain on the task so we can see the original planned due date for the task. Hope it makes sense.
